feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CPI OData V4 POST – Invalid CSRF Token Error for WarehouseTask Confirm API (EWM A2X)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently working with the standard SAP EWM API – Warehouse Order and Task (A2X), specifically using the WarehouseTask entity. This is an OData V4 API.

🔹 Scenario

I am trying to perform a POST operation to confirm a Warehouse Task using the below endpoint:

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_warehouse_order_task_2/srvd_a2x/sap/warehouseorder/0001/WarehouseTask/EU20/1234563436/0/SAP__self.ConfirmWarehouseTaskHndlgUnit

Where:

  • EU20 → EWM Warehouse
  • 1234563436 → Warehouse Task
  • 0 → Warehouse Task Item

🔹 Approach Followed

  1. First, I executed a GET call on the same API to:

    • Fetch the CSRF token
    • Retrieve the corresponding ETag for the specific combination (Warehouse, WarehouseTask, WarehouseTaskItem)in the body.

  2. For the POST request:

    • I used the same CSRF token in the header
    • Set the header:
      If-Match = <ETag (from GET response)>

🔹 Issue Faced

While triggering the POST request, I am receiving the following error:

Invalid CSRF token

🔹 Observed Behavior

  • In the CPI trace logs (receiver side), I can see that the CSRF token is being passed in the request header.
  • However, after the failure:
    • In the request headers attachment, the CSRF token appears as "fetch" instead of the actual token value.

This is creating a confusing situation, as the token seems to be passed but still results in an "Invalid CSRF token" error.

🔹 API Reference

For reference, I am using the API from SAP Business Accelerator Hub:
Warehouse Task Confirm API

🔹 Ask

Has anyone encountered a similar issue while working with this API or OData V4 CSRF handling in CPI?

Any guidance on:

  • Correct CSRF handling approach, or
  • Possible reasons why the token is getting replaced with "fetch"
    would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Define bank transfer tile App id: F3759 - Custom Field are not available in Adapt UI
entry.content: Custom field was created on "Custom Field app " using Business Context " Payment Request " and "Bank Account Master Data ", but when we are trying to add custom field on "Define bank transfer tile App id: F3759" using Adaption UI , new custom field is not available to add on app

entry.title: Solution for Attachment Replication from SAP Business Suite to sales cloud V2?
entry.content:
The standard Replicate Sales Order and Sales Quote from SAP S4HANA iFlow only covers header, products, prices, and parties "no attachments".

Is there a standard SAP iFlow/content package for replicating S/4 sales order/quote attachments to Sales Cloud V2 (similar to the old C4C AttachmentFolderReplicationRequest_Out scenario)? Or is a custom post-exit using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV → V2 AttachmentFolder the only way? or there is any other way to handle this integration

Has anyone built this in a live project?

Many Thanks,

Ruchita

entry.title: Issue with oauth authentication while calling Integration flow
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created one Oauth clinent and also added the role ESBMesseging.send role to it, i can fetch the access token but not able to call the endpoint iflow of https in CPI and getting 403 error

entry.title: API is still valid ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We were using the API to extract sender host type and Receiver host type .Just wanted to know if this API "{cpi_url}/api/v1/IntegrationConnections?$expand=IntegrationFlows&$filter=ResolvedConnection eq true&$inlinecount=allpages  " been retired ?  If so, Any new API been released or any API available which provide the same details.

Below is the blog from where we picked the API .

SAP Cloud Platform Integration - Connection count ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to create story report
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

When trying to create story report in SF QAS instance, it is giving a blank page and giving message - "Full Screen mode toggled as we detected you are using a low resolution. More information about our minimum resolution requirements can be found at help.sap.com " 

Kindly find the attached screenshot with the error.

entry.title: SAP BTP Neo to Cloud Foundry migration using Postman collection
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

I am performing SAP BTP Neo to Cloud Foundry Migration using Postman Collection provided by SAP.
I am following the steps mentioned in the following SAP Help document :  'https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration-migration-guide/migrating-cloud-integration-from-neo-environment-to-multi-cloud-foundation'.
The collection 'Connect to Tenants' executed successfully. The collection 'Custom Content' executed successfully. I am able to migrate Package successfully.

Regarding uploading 'sap_cloudintegrationcertificate' from both environments, I have followed instructions as provided in SAP Help document

When executing the collection 'CPI MIG090 Security Artifacts' got the following exception for all the requests in the collection - 
'Exception: com.sap.it.cm.transport.exception.TransportManagementBackendException: No DNS name found in the system property or user provided certificate'.

( For 'sap_cloudintegrationcertificate' in Neo environment there is 'Subject Alternative Name' which contains 'DNS' value where as it is missing in Cloud Foundry environment. )

Could anyone please provide guidance on the issue?

Thank you.

entry.title: Custom Domain on Cloud Foundry subaccount to call Integration Suite endpoint on Neo subaccount
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

We are implementing FatturaPA (Italy's tax authority eDocument requirement) for a customer running Integration Suite on a Neo subaccount. Customers must register they web service endpoint under a domain thy own (see https://me.sap.com/notes/2583309 and https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/fatturapa-edocument-italy-signing-custom-domain/qaq-p/731320).

We have performed the set up in customers running both integration suite and custom domain on Neo or with both running in cloud foundry but SAP refuses to sell customer domain on Neo because it is on sunset.

Customer is migrating from Neo to Cloud Foundry as part of a large scale revamp project starting in January 2027 so migrating Integration Suite to Cloud Foundry now is out of question but FatturaPA mus be set up by October.

Can a custom domain running in a Cloud Foundry subaccount be used to call an Integration Suite endpoint running in Neo on a different subaccount?

If yes, can you kindly let us know how or point the relevant documentation? We have already tried Routes and Sharing Reserved Domains with no luck.

If no, is there any official SAP source, such a SAP Note that says so explicitly?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Jose

entry.title: Electronic Invoicing France
entry.content:
Good morning,

we are implementing incoming electronic invoicing for France and we would need a sample XML file related to a French electronic invoice.

Unfortunately, we have not been able to find an example either online or within the Build Work Zone dedicated to France.

Could you please provide us with a sample XML file to be used as a reference for our implementation activities?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - MCP Capability - API Management - When available?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'd like to start using the MCP capability of integration suite (see the video: https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/integration-suite/agentic-ai.html ), but I wonder when it will be available on our Standard Integration Suite tenants. The A2A will take some time so the MCP is the best guess, I guess...

Any (official) idea?

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: GitHub Integration is not available for tenants
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I understood that SAP released GitHub Integration for Integration suite. I am trying to see the GitHub related options in my tenants but cant find. 

I have admin and developer role in all tenants but I am not able to see it. 

Do we have any prerequisites to enable GitHub Inytegration?

entry.title: unable to deploy the Value mapping Iflow
entry.content:
In QA environment, we are unable to deploy the Value mapping Iflow 
'Value mappings for the employee data integration' deployment failed.
Error Details

[CONTENT][CONTENT_DEPLOY][ArtifactDeploymentFailed] : All attempts of deployment of artifact failed. Error details: Optional[Caused By : Activator start error in bundle SAP_SuccessFactors_Employee_Central_to_WorkForce_Software_Suite_Value_Mappings.DR [1051]. | Caused By : This Value Mapping contains a group () that has an Agency Identifier pair [WFS, WFS Status Ranking] : [EC, EC Employment Status], which conflicts with group

entry.title: Need to create a subaccount in Cloud Connector for Integration Suite PRD
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Create a sub account in Cloud Connector Cloud Connector

Attached details of BTP Integration Suite PRD details as attached. Let me know what the process and time would be taken for subaccount creation.

entry.title: When will the SAP Integration Suite Certification be active again?
entry.content:
So, the SAP Certified - Integration Developer certification is currently under maintenance, I wanted to schedule a slot for the certification today but I don't seem to be able to do it

 Any idea by what time will this certification be active again as I am in a bit of a time crunch with regard to this cert...

Thanks

entry.title: How to Implement a Queuing System in SAP Integration Suite, Starter Edition?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently using SAP Integration Suite, Starter Edition, with Cloud Integration capacity.

As part of our integration project, we need to implement a queuing mechanism to manage a high volume of incoming requests and process them reliably without overloading the integration flow or the target SAP system.

We would like your recommendations regarding the following points:

  • Is it possible to implement a queuing system with the Starter Edition?
  • Does this edition support JMS queues, or is an additional capability or license required?
  • If JMS is unavailable, what alternative architecture would you recommend?
  • Can Data Store operations be used to create a reliable queuing mechanism?
  • How can we control parallel processing, retries, message order, and error handling?
  • Are there any known capacity or performance limitations in the Starter Edition?

Our objective is to receive requests from an external system, store them temporarily, and process them asynchronously according to the available capacity.

Any recommended architecture, configuration example, or relevant documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Cloud Foundry not accesible/visible under the sub-account in SAP BTP cockpit
entry.content:
HI All,

I have created recently the Subaccount in SAP Trial but it I am not able to see any cloud foundry tab in the left penal. not sure its a issue in BTP recently, can you please help.

 

Regards,

Dibyajyoti Nanda

entry.title: handshake_failure
entry.content:
I need to create a integration to retrieve data about in employee using rest API developed by Brazil government.

 

The endpoint is this : https://papiecotrab.dataprev.gov.br/credito-trabalhador-empregador/v1.0.0/dados-consignacoes-empregador

 

I need to develop this integration in SAP Cloud Integration, but when I try to test the connectivity, I received this error:

 

“javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: (handshake_failure) Received fatal alert: handshake_failure”

entry.title: Ereporting France implementation without einvoicing is it possible
entry.content:
hello

is it possible to implemente the Ereporting France Sales and purchasing without the full implmentation of einvoicing?
We just need the ereporting process

Thanks

entry.title: Reimagining SAP Certification ERROR
entry.content:
I want to extend my certification, but I can't, I have to pay then. My colleague, however, was able to extend it normally.

but if i klick on take assessment, i cant extend it.

 

 

 

HEEELP i have  no more Time

entry.title: SAP BTP CI Mapping Output - JSON payload output segments are not in sequence
entry.content:
Issue Summary 

We are using SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration Graphical Message Mapping with a target JSON schema imported through an OpenAPI 3.0 schema reference. The schema defines a specific property sequence intended for external API consumers. 

Expected Behavior 

The generated JSON payload should preserve the property order defined in the target schema. Example order: trackingId, timestamp, header, shippingPoint, partner, address. The payload attached for reference. 

Actual Behavior 

During message mapping execution and in the MPL payload, SAP CPI generates JSON properties in a different order. Example output places address, header, partner before trackingId and timestamp. The order does not match the schema definition. 

Business Impact 

The inability to preserve schema property order creates a mismatch between the documented schema and the runtime payload. 

We found below OSS 3596225 note related to this. But want to understand the SAP solution provided if we are going to expose json schema definition to partner and want to use the same schema definitions  from Open API. H
